预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, the somewhat negative school reputation, and average Douyin popularity, it is expected that competition in Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 50304, with a range of 49804–50804.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学在河北省医学类近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年18507名（计划7人）、2022年19795名（计划12人）、2023年23947名（计划12人）、2024年48790名（计划26人 ）、2025年38007名（计划26人）。2024年因医学类招生计划从12人大幅扩至26人，位次出现明显下降；2025年计划持平，位次回升至38007名。2026年医学类计划为24人，较2025 年缩招2人（-7.7%），缩招将导致竞争加剧，位次有上升压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校，位于湖南省长沙市。作为一所综合性师范大学，其医学部（咸嘉湖校区）设有临床医学、药学、预防医学等专业， 医学学科虽非学校传统优势，但依托211平台和双一流建设，整体办学实力和社会认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来医学类专业报考热度持续高涨，临床医学等专业尤其受到考生青睐。湖南师范大学医学部位于长沙，属于中部省会城市，地理位置适中，对河北考生有一定吸引力。河北 省内医学类招生规模有限，省外优质医学教育资源竞争激烈。2026年缩招将进一步推高录取门槛。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量2026年医学类缩招2人、近年位次回升趋势以及医学报考热度持续等因素，预测2026年湖南师范大学在河北省医学类最低录取位次约为36553名，波动区间为36053至3705 3名。位次较2025年有所上升（更难进），反映了缩招和医学热度双重影响下的自然波动。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University in Hebei Province in the medical category over the past five years are: 2021: 18,507 (planned 7 students), 2022: 19,795 (planned 12 students), 2023: 23,947 (planned 12 students), 2024: 48,790 (planned 26 students), 2025: 38,007 (planned 26 students). In 2024, due to a significant expansion of the medical enrollment plan from 12 to 26 students, the ranking dropped noticeably; in 2025, the plan remained unchanged, and the ranking rebounded to 38,007. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is 24 students, a reduction of 2 students (-7.7%) compared to 2025. This reduction will intensify competition, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. As a comprehensive normal university, its Medical Department (Xianjiahu Campus) offers majors such as Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, and Preventive Medicine. Although medical disciplines are not the university's traditional strength, relying on the 211 platform and Double First-Class construction, the overall educational strength and social recognition are relatively high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been continuously rising, with Clinical Medicine and other specialties being particularly favored by examinees. Hunan Normal University's Medical Department is located in Changsha, a provincial capital in central China, with a moderate geographical location, which has a certain appeal to Hebei examinees. The scale of medical enrollment within Hebei Province is limited, and competition for high-quality medical education resources outside the province is fierce. The enrollment reduction in 2026 will further raise the admission threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the reduction of 2 students in the medical enrollment plan for 2026, the recent upward trend in rankings, and the sustained popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University in Hebei Province in the medical category for 2026 will be approximately 36,553, with a fluctuation range of 36,053 to 37,053. The ranking will increase compared to 2025 (making it harder to enter), reflecting the natural fluctuation under the dual influence of enrollment reduction and medical popularity.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. Clinical Medicine is the most competitive, requiring a ranking far above the lower bound of the predicted range; Medical Laboratory Technology and Pharmacy are moderately difficult majors, suitable for examinees in the middle of the range; Preventive Medicine is relatively easy to enter and can be used as a safety choice.
